Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire

Class WhatAmIMatcher

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.WhatAmIMatcher
public final class WhatAmIMatcher extends Object
Scouting-side role matcher bitmap.

Unlike WhatAmI (which encodes exactly one role in 2 bits as it appears in INIT / OPEN / HELLO), a WhatAmIMatcher is a bitmap that appears in the low 3 bits of a SCOUT message's flags byte and asks "please reply if you are any of the roles I have set here". A single SCOUT can therefore ask about routers, peers and clients at once.

The wire bits are (from the reference source):

  • 0b001 = Router
  • 0b010 = Peer
  • 0b100 = Client

These are deliberately different from the WhatAmI enum's ordinal-style bits (0b00/0b01/0b10) used by INIT/OPEN/HELLO. Do not confuse the two; the two id spaces are separate per the Zenoh wire spec.

    Description
    static final int
    BIT_CLIENT
    Client bit in the SCOUT matcher bitmap.

    BIT_PEER
    Peer bit in the SCOUT matcher bitmap.
    static final int
    BIT_ROUTER

    static final int
    VALID_MASK
    Only these three bits are defined; the rest are reserved.

    • bits

      public int bits()
      Raw 3-bit bitmap ready to OR into a flags byte.

    • matchesRouter

      public boolean matchesRouter()
      True if this matcher would match a HELLO from a router.

    • matchesPeer

      public boolean matchesPeer()
      True if this matcher would match a HELLO from a peer.

    • matchesClient

      public boolean matchesClient()
      True if this matcher would match a HELLO from a client.

    • matches

      public boolean matches(WhatAmI role)
      True if this matcher's bitmap includes the given WhatAmI role.

    • roles

      public Set<WhatAmI> roles()
      Convert to the WhatAmI enums that are set in this matcher.

    • any

      public static WhatAmIMatcher any()
      All three roles - the "give me everything" default.

    • of

      public static WhatAmIMatcher of(WhatAmI role)
      Just the given single role.

    • of

      public static WhatAmIMatcher of(Set<WhatAmI> roles)
      OR of the given roles; empty set is rejected.

    • fromBits

      public static WhatAmIMatcher fromBits(int bits)
      Parse a raw 3-bit bitmap from a SCOUT flags byte's low nibble. Rejects zero (a SCOUT with no roles set makes no sense) and any bits outside VALID_MASK.
